prompt: Add a new model class called PlanogramSummary with these fields: PlanogramKey (int), Name (string), StoreNumber (string), Width (double), Height (double), EffectiveDate (double).

assertions.name: uses-internal-class
assertions.description: Class is declared with internal visibility

assertions.name: uses-auto-properties
assertions.description: All fields are auto-properties with get; set; — no backing fields, no constructor assignments

assertions.name: no-constructor-body
assertions.description: No custom constructor with initialization logic
